code:
import io
import string
import list

fn find_index(_ nums: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  list.index_of(nums, target)
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line1)

  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    let part = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(part)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
    i = i + 1
  end

  let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end

  match find_index(nums, target)
  when Some(idx)
    print("index=#{idx}")
  when None
    print("not_found")
  end

  Ok(())
end
